_meta.source: MFM WARGEAR OPTIONS blocks; see MFM_Instructions.txt (UNITS > Wargear)
_meta.rule: cost is per item TAKEN, applied on top of the unit's main points cost; default-issue items are taken items and are priced (D107 / B35)
_meta.key: datasheet_id -> items -> lowercased item name -> {cost, display, source}
_meta.engine: match rollup weapon/equipment names by weaponBase(name).toLowerCase()

_addons.source: MFM additive add-on lines ('• + 1 <name><cost> pts'); see B59b, D182, D184
_addons.rule: cross-chapter-validated audit trail only -- the engine reads a literal price_per_model on the unit_loadouts.json model group, not this file, for this shape (D173's rejection of the reachable-item lookup for model-group pricing still stands)
_addons.key: datasheet_id -> lowercased add-on name -> {cost, count, display, source}
